police_page_value: Projekt ORION / Optimized Risk-based Intelligence-driven Operations for Next-generation Secure, Reliable and Privacy-preserving Border Management
cordis_value: ORION / Optimized Risk-based Intelligence-driven Operations for Next-generation Secure, Reliable and Privacy-preserving Border Management / grant agreement ID 101225611 / DOI 10.3030/101225611
paper_safe_use_now: Use as the reviewer-safe identity bridge proving that the Slovenian police page and the EU project fact sheet describe the same Horizon project.
overread_to_avoid: Do not treat identity alignment alone as proof of deployment, legality, effectiveness, or procurement traceability.
source_refs: Policija ORION page accessed 2026-06-08; CORDIS project fact sheet https://cordis.europa.eu/project/id/101225611 accessed 2026-06-08; DOI https://doi.org/10.3030/101225611 resolved to same CORDIS page on 2026-06-08
next_smallest_publishability_move: Promote this identity bridge into shared multilingual/citation controls if another consumer still treats ORION as police-page-only.

police_page_value: Project started 1 September 2025; lasts 36 months; total allocated funding 5,240,093.75 EUR; 100 percent Horizon-funded for Slovenian police implementation
cordis_value: EC signature date 16 July 2025; start 1 September 2025; end 31 August 2028; EU contribution 5,240,093.75 EUR; funded under Civil Security for Society / HORIZON-IA
paper_safe_use_now: Supports bounded manuscript/table wording that the police page's funding-and-duration claims are externally matched by an EU project record.
overread_to_avoid: Do not convert programme metadata into proof of operational deployment, compliance, or impact.
source_refs: Policija ORION page accessed 2026-06-08; CORDIS project fact sheet accessed 2026-06-08
next_smallest_publishability_move: If reused in prose, keep the claim at funding/programme/date alignment rather than project-success inference.

police_page_value: Project coordinated by UBITECH LIMITED (Cyprus); financed by the EU via REA
cordis_value: Coordinated by UBITECH LIMITED, Cyprus; CORDIS public fact sheet for grant 101225611
paper_safe_use_now: Adds one non-police governance surface that keeps ORION from remaining a single-family official-disclosure row.
overread_to_avoid: Do not infer consortium liability allocation, procurement structure, or final system ownership from coordinator metadata.
source_refs: Policija ORION page accessed 2026-06-08; CORDIS project fact sheet accessed 2026-06-08
next_smallest_publishability_move: A later route could add one participant or deliverable page only if it changes the pilot-versus-deployment ceiling.

police_page_value: AI-assisted border management; passenger identification and verification, vehicle screening, privacy-preserving encrypted biometric processing, legally compliant recommendations; pilot scenarios in Romania, Bulgaria, Slovenia
cordis_value: Advanced technologies to streamline controls, improve inter-agency communication, dynamically allocate resources, enforce interoperability with existing databases and legacy systems, reduce congestion/energy impact, ensure legal/ethical compliance; four use cases including Ro-Ro embarkment, Ro-Ro disembarkment, land-border risk assessment/resource allocation, and train-passenger security
paper_safe_use_now: Supports a bounded statement that the CORDIS fact sheet broadens the public project description beyond the Slovenian police summary while remaining consistent with pilot/resource-allocation framing.
overread_to_avoid: Do not flatten the two summaries into one exhaustive technical specification or claim that every listed use case is active in Slovenia.
source_refs: Policija ORION page accessed 2026-06-08; CORDIS project fact sheet accessed 2026-06-08
next_smallest_publishability_move: If needed for the paper, cite the police page for Slovenia-facing pilot wording and CORDIS for programme-level objective framing.

police_page_value: Consortium includes 21 partners from 14 countries, including five border authorities and two operators
paper_safe_use_now: Useful as a hostile-reviewer caution note: public companion depth improved, but consortium-size reporting is not yet a clean one-number claim across public surfaces.
overread_to_avoid: Do not present 19 and 21 as a settled contradiction or choose one as final without the grant annex/participant list definition.
source_refs: Policija ORION page accessed 2026-06-08; CORDIS project fact sheet accessed 2026-06-08
next_smallest_publishability_move: Treat participant/partner count as unresolved metadata and postpone exact-count prose unless a participant-list extract or grant annex becomes necessary.
